creator: mel@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
On Sunday 22 March 2009 11:32:29 pav@freebsd.org wrote:

> State-Changed-Why:
> Similar but different patch committed

Thanks! If you like, I can submit a list of origins or a patch against their 
respective makefiles for ports I know to be unsafe. Some (f.e. 
audio/libsndfile) are caused by autotools, as they want to run aclocal in 
parallel. Maybe this can be fixed more generically. Currently the list has 22 
ports out of approx 750 origins made.
-- 
Mel
